action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 23 smoke test showed catastrophic failure (all map types failed) because the CommitPlanner code in predict.py was truncated/corrupted. The best-ever eval score remains 0.6118 (iteration 7), with recent stable scores ~0.607 using a simple global GreedyPlanner. Analysis: We have ~1 hour and 8 iterations left. The highest-probability improvement is to run the true tuned config from iteration 21's local search (dist_denom=2.0, reverse_penalty=0.3, visited_penalty=0.1, persist_boost=1.05), which was never actually evaluated on the full dataset because train.py likely saved the old 3.6 config. I will completely rewrite predict.py and train.py from scratch with clean, robust code, run a quick smoke test, and immediately submit evaluation.
